context: Tests whether the agent correctly designs the multi-channel recovery sequence with the right channel order, timing, and cart-value-based incentive escalation, avoids early discounts, applies segment-based logic for VIP customers, handles SMS opt-in, and keeps the sequence to the right number of touchpoints.

checklist.name: 4-step max sequence
checklist.description: Recovery sequence contains exactly 4 steps (or fewer) — does NOT exceed 4 touchpoints

checklist.name: Channel order
checklist.description: Sequence follows the order: email first, then push, then email, then SMS (email → push → email → sms)

checklist.name: Step 1 timing
checklist.description: First step (email) is delayed by 1 hour (60 minutes / 3600000ms) from abandonment

checklist.name: Step 2 timing
checklist.description: Second step (push) is delayed by 4 hours (14400000ms) from abandonment

checklist.name: Step 3/4 timing
checklist.description: Third step is at 24 hours and fourth step is at 48 hours from abandonment

checklist.name: No discount on steps 1-2
checklist.description: First two steps (email and push) have null incentive — no discount or free shipping offered

checklist.name: High-value step 3 incentive
checklist.description: For carts ≥ $100, step 3 offers free_shipping (not a % discount)

checklist.name: Low-value step 3 incentive
checklist.description: For carts < $100, step 3 offers percent_off with value 10

checklist.name: High-value step 4 escalation
checklist.description: For carts ≥ $100, step 4 escalates to percent_off with value 15

checklist.name: VIP free shipping only
checklist.description: VIP customers (≥ $500 lifetime spend) receive free_shipping incentive and never a percent_off discount

checklist.name: First-time abandoner no incentive
checklist.description: Customers with zero prior recovery sequences receive null incentive (no offer withheld)

checklist.name: SMS opt-in gate
checklist.description: SMS step is gated behind opt-in check — either via `smsMarketingOptIn` field or equivalent guard that defaults to NOT sending

checklist.name: One-time discount codes
checklist.description: STRATEGY.md or code documents/implements that discount codes are one-time use (not reusable/shareable)
